channel.title: Docker on jqknono Blogs
channel.description: Recent content in Docker on jqknono Blogs

item.title: VS Code Dev Container IO 过高: executeInWSL 配置详解与根因分析
item.author: https://blog.jqknono.com (jqknono)
item.description: 记录 Windows 上 VS Code Dev Container 扩展导致 IO 过高问题的完整排查过程, 从现象定位到根因分析, 最终以 dev.containers.executeInWSL 为核心方案解决 Docker CLI 跨边界通信瓶颈.
